text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The Satono family's dream was to produce an
illustrious racer capable of winning G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was young, I raced in the hopes of
becoming that illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now, having won a G1 race in the Twinkle Series,
today I embark on a new challenge.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Today, I challenge illustrious runners I've aspired
to be like—as their rival.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And also you, who has been by my side since the
day we met.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even if you started running before me... Even if
the races we entered and the goals we strived for
differed...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Today I will share the turf with the people I've
always looked up to. I've dreamed of this moment
before ever enrolling at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It was through our rivalry that I was able to reach
this point.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But only one of us can be crowned the winner!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose! Not to you! Not to McQueen! And
not to Teio either!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll triumph and make my family's dream—my
dream—come true!
